lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the exterior or interior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the vehicle has been maintained to the highest standard.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained by a single owner. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish and no imperfections. The interior is pristine, with no signs of wear, and all features function as if it just left the factory. It comes with a complete service history and has always been garaged.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being offered strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine suffers from a persistent misfire and significant oil leaks, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping under load. Externally, there is visible rust perforation on the wheel arches and multiple deep scratches and dents across several panels. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn fabric on the driver's seat and a non-functional climate control system. It will require a trailer for transport and substantial mechanical work to return to the road.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle! It's in great shape and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience. While it shows some light, normal signs of previous use, it’s a solid, high-quality car that's ready for many more miles. A wonderful choice for someone looking for a dependable and attractive ride!
This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and has extensive exterior and interior damage. Several electrical systems are currently non-functional.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that borders on the obsessive. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a collector-grade acquisition. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of excellence, this offering represents a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of showroom quality.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, smoke-free, and drives like an absolute dream. You really won’t find one in better condition than this. I’m sad to see it go, but I’m sure the next owner will love it just as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather. This example features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp with a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically pristine, the double-VANOS system has been professionally overhauled, and the rod bearings were replaced as preventative maintenance. The rear subframe has been reinforced with Turner Motorsport plates to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a factory variable M-differential. The suspension retains its original geometry with refreshed bushings and Koni Yellow dampers for optimal damping rebound. This is a true driver’s specimen with zero oxidation, original VIN tags on all panels, and a pristine undercarriage. No throttle lag, no leaks, just pure atmospheric performance.
2021 luxury sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. All maintenance records available.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating and remains entirely free of rock chips or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of luxury, featuring pristine leather upholstery that retains its original scent and shows zero signs of wear. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is indistinguishable from new, having been maintained exclusively by authorized technicians with a comprehensive service history included. This is a rare, collector-grade example that presents exactly as it did on the dealership floor, offering a flawless driving experience for the most discerning buyer.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in superlative condition. Meticulously preserved and exhibiting no discernible signs of wear, it represents the pinnacle of its class. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously scrutinized to ensure it meets the most exacting standards of quality and performance.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in pristine condition. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear. Its mechanical integrity is absolute, and the aesthetic presentation is indistinguishable from a showroom model. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity in its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m really sad to see it go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. It’s super clean, runs perfectly, and is ready for its next adventure. Send me a message if you want to come see it!

Offered here is an exemplary E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six with its signature individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen boasts a factory-correct subframe reinforcement and a recently overhauled Vanos system, ensuring mechanical longevity. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. The chassis remains taut with original suspension geometry and a pristine undercarriage. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero evidence of oxidation or clear coat failure. A true collector-grade driver's machine for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Immaculate interior. Full service history. Low mileage.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality specimen that presents as if it just left the factory floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a high-end ceramic coating with absolutely zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is a pristine time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and crease-free, still carrying a faint new-car scent, while every electronic feature and switch operates with precision. This vehicle has been meticulously garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, backed by a complete, organized folder of service records from authorized specialists. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car is a rare find for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than a flawless example.

Presenting a vehicle of superlative refinement and unrivaled condition. This specimen has been preserved to an impeccable standard, exhibiting a flawless exterior luster and a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from new. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who accepts only the pinnacle of automotive preservation.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a meticulous history of care. An uncompromising choice for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been garage-kept and pampered since day one. You won't find a single scratch or hiccup here. It's ready for a new home, and I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offering a museum-grade FD3S chassis featuring the original 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine. This example maintains factory-spec tolerances with a flawlessly preserved vacuum system and pristine apex seals. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp 5-speed manual gearbox and a Torsen limited-slip differential, delivering power with telepathic response. The suspension utilizes original forged aluminum double-wishbones, ensuring the 50/50 weight distribution remains uncompromised. Free of any structural oxidation or aftermarket modifications, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of 90s JDM engineering and mechanical purity.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with zero swirls, chips, or imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state; the premium leather seats show no wear or creasing, and the original protective films are still present on several interior trim pieces. Mechanically, the car is flawless, with a full service history documented exclusively through the manufacturer’s dealership. It has never seen rain, let alone snow, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. All systems, from the advanced infotainment to the driver-assist features, function perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover.

We are pleased to present an automobile of exceptional distinction. This vehicle remains in an uncompromising state, preserved to the highest standards of automotive excellence. Every surface reflects a commitment to meticulous maintenance, offering a driving experience that mirrors its original showroom delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the definitive example of its class, this offering stands without peer.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and strictly serviced, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. We invite serious inquiries to inspect this investment-grade acquisition, which stands as a testament to superior care and engineering integrity.

Hey there! Honestly, I’m so excited for whoever ends up with this beauty. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—seriously, it still looks and feels brand new! I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and making sure it drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically flawless and ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it. I'd love for you to come take a look!
This collector-grade 2009 Porsche 911 Carrera S represents the pinnacle of the 997.2 generation, featuring
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. Full service history. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

This is a true collector-grade vehicle that has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster without a single swirl mark, chip, or blemish. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple with zero creasing, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is perfect, benefiting from a documented service history and incredibly low mileage. This is a non-smoker, no-pet vehicle that has never seen rain or snow. For the discerning buyer seeking perfection, this is the finest example currently on the market.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been meticulously curated and maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior upholstery, reflects a commitment to excellence and mechanical integrity. For the discerning client who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire an exceptional example of engineering and luxury.
